name: Type 1944 100mm Cannon (WB004P HE-Frag) (BS-3)
description:
Type 1944 100mm cannon is the domestic designation for the Soviet 100mm field gun M1944 (BS-3). Nominal velocity is 900m/s.
Reference:
 《火炮内弹道计算手册》(1987)
 《火炸药手册 (增订本）第二分册》(1981).

name: Type 1931/37 122mm Cannon (WB013P HE-Frag) (A-19)
description:
Type 1931/1937 122mm cannon is the domestic designation for the Soviet 122mm corps gun M1931/1937 (A-19). Nominal velocity is 800m/s.
Reference:
 《火炮内弹道计算手册》(1987)
 《火炸药手册 (增订本）第二分册》(1981).

name: Type 1959 130mm Cannon (WB005P HE-Frag, Full Charge) (M-46)
description:
Type 1959 130mm cannon is the designation for domestically produced variants of the Soviet 130mm towed field gun M1954 (M-46). The Full Variable charge is supplied with a main charge bag of 11kg, and a supplementary charge bag of 1.9kg. This case represents when both are left in. Nominal velocity is 930m/s.
Reference:
 《火炮内弹道计算手册》(1987)
 《火炸药手册 (增订本）第二分册》(1981).

name: Type 1959 130mm Cannon (WB005P HE-Frag, No.1 Charge) (M-46)
description:
Type 1959 130mm cannon is the designation for domestically produced variants of the Soviet 130mm towed field gun M1954 (M-46). The Full Variable cahrge is supplied with a main charge bag of 11kg, and a supplementary charge bag of 1.9kg. This case represents the supplementary charge bag taken out. Nominal velocity is 810m/s.
Reference:
 《火炮内弹道计算手册》(1987)
 《火炸药手册 (增订本）第二分册》(1981).
